title: RSD Bajaj Global Law Firm is looking to hire senior associate in Gurugram
description: RSD Bajaj Global Law Firm is looking for a senior associate with expertise in General Corporate, Venture Capital (VC) and Private Equity (PE) transactions to join our core team at DLF Phase 1, Gurugram.Job DescriptionWe are looking for a senior lawyer who has proven legal acumen in handling PE/VC transactions and general corporate advisory. This is not a conventional law firm role. You will be working directly with the Founding Managing Partners on high-value mandates advising leading new econom
